channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/16)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然是 AI 和编程的天下，特别是围绕 **AI Agent** 和 **Claude Code** 的讨论和工具层出不穷。我发现几个特别有意思的点：一是大家已经不满足于用单个AI，开始搞“多智能体协作”和“自动化工作流”了；二是关于“AI辅助编程到底改变了什么”的深度讨论变多了，不只是工具层面，还有职业影响；三是出现了不少帮你“管理”或“增强”现有AI工具（尤其是Claude Code）的实用小工具，解决实际使用中的痛点。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然是 AI 和编程的天下，特别是围绕 **AI Agent** 和 **Claude Code** 的讨论和工具层出不穷。我发现几个特别有意思的点：一是大家已经不满足于用单个AI，开始搞“多智能体协作”和“自动化工作流”了；二是关于“AI辅助编程到底改变了什么”的深度讨论变多了，不只是工具层面，还有职业影响；三是出现了不少帮你“管理”或“增强”现有AI工具（尤其是Claude Code）的实用小工具，解决实际使用中的痛点。

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 6 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Eng Manager, Release Manager and QA Engineer | 近期热门 | 总 14335 stars
item.author: garrytan

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open | 近期热门 | 总 1569 stars
item.author: pasky

item.title: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
item.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Claude Code skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation via Codex MCP | 近期热门 | 总 1356 stars
item.author: wanshuiyin

item.title: skernelx/tavily-key-generator
item.description: Auto batch register Tavily API Keys with pluggable email backends | 近期热门 | 总 922 stars
item.author: skernelx

item.title: RightNow-AI/autokernel
item.description: Autoresearch for GPU kernels. Give it any PyTorch model, go to sleep, wake up to optimized Triton kernels. | 近期热门 | 总 646 stars
item.author: RightNow-AI

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes. | 近期热门 | 总 546 stars
item.author: calesthio

item.title: KeyID-AI/agent-kit
item.description: Give Claude/Cursor email powers. 27 MCP tools — inbox, send, reply, contacts, search. Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 444 stars
item.author: KeyID-AI

item.title: aidenybai/element-source
item.description: Get the source file location of any DOM element. Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Solid | 近期热门 | 总 260 stars
item.author: aidenybai

item.title: aidenybai/element-source
item.description: Get the source file location of any DOM element. Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Solid | 近期热门 | 总 260 stars
item.author: aidenybai

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it. | 近期热门 | 总 253 stars
item.author: Infatoshi
